description: iOS learning app for autistic children covering early skills such as letters, colors, emotions, numbers, and vocabulary; listed in autism-app roundups and app-focused research as a skills-support tool.[1][2][4][5]
title: Autism iHelp  Alphabet, Colors, Emotions, Numbers, etc.

description: A specialized mood tracking mobile app for children with autism, using emoticons, colors, and simple language to facilitate emotional self-awareness and recording of feelings in an accessible, child-friendly interface.
title: Affect (Mood Tracking App for Autism)

description: A mobile app designed to help children with autism understand and communicate their feelings through images and animated characters, teaching them to recognize and label emotions in a visual, engaging format.
title: Autism Emotion App

description: A mobile app designed for families and clinicians to screen for autism in children at home. Uses video-based activities and machine learning to analyze social responses, with 77% sensitivity and 91% specificity in clinical validation studies.
title: ASDetect - Autism Screening App

description: Leading AAC app for iOS that helps children with limited verbal skills communicate using symbols, pictures, and text-to-speech voices.
title: Proloquo2Go

description: Comprehensive AAC app for iOS and Android offering wide vocabulary customization and text-to-speech for nonverbal communication.
title: TouchChat HD  AAC with WordPowerTM

description: Free AAC app for iOS and Android with no ads, designed for speech-impaired children to build sentences using pictures and text.
title: LetMeTalk

description: iOS version of the LetMeTalk app providing alternative communication tools for children with autism and speech delays.
title: LetMeTalk (iOS)

description: AI-powered AAC app for iOS and Android using advanced word prediction and text-to-speech for nonverbal autism and aphasia.
title: Spoken - Tap to Talk AAC

description: iOS app for creating customizable choice boards to support communication in individuals with autism and other developmental disabilities.
title: ChoiceBoard Maker

description: A visual scheduling app that uses images, timers, and checklists to create daily routines and reminders, helping young adults with autism manage time and transitions effectively.
title: Choiceworks - Visual Schedule, Timer & Reminders for Autism

description: iOS app designed to help individuals with autism regulate emotions through guided breathing, calming visuals, and soothing soundscapes; also available on Android via Google Play.
title: Peaceable - Calming & Relaxation App

description: Free iOS and Android app created by Teen Health to teach CBT-based tools for anxiety management, including grounding exercises and mindfulness techniques for neurodivergent users.
title: MindShift CBT - Anxiety Relief App

description: Non-profit meditation app for iOS and Android offering age-specific mindfulness programs, including 'Youth' and 'Children' modules designed to support emotional regulation in autistic individuals.
title: Smiling Mind - Meditation & Calm

description: iOS and Android haptic feedback app providing tapping and sliding interactions for sensory regulation; ideal for environments where physical fidget tools are not available.
title: Tappy Fidget - Sensory Regulation Tool

description: iOS app designed by child psychologist Jacqueline Vorpahl to teach children with autism specific relaxation techniques through animated stories and guided mindfulness exercises.
title: Chill Outz - Relaxation for Kids

description: Official product page for the Zones of Regulation app (iOS/Android), based on a framework to help children consciously regulate behaviors, emotions, and alertness levels to improve self-regulation.
title: Zones of Regulation App
